case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. vs. LUCERO, RODOLFO

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, RODOLFO SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-24-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-20-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-07-1999
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. SERVED JUN-21-1999, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, RODOLFO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $137.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUCERO, RODOLFO
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCERO, RODOLFO $4,617.09 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $273.60 INTEREST, $137.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,827.69

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-24-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY DONEHUE FOSTER. HEARING SET FOR NOV-03-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.
